subcodes.first_line: O Sughrá! hearken unto the rustling of the Most Exalted Pen, and detach thyself from all else but God. Be thou gladdened by His remembrance and through His mention [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای صغرا بشنو صریر قلم اعلی را و از ما سوی الله بگذر بیادش خرم باش و بذکرش
subcodes.subjects: @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @praise and encouragement, @love of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual transformation
